title: Crocodile Island
subTitle: The stranded passengers must fight against man-eating crocodiles after their plane makes an emergency landing on a remote island.

title: Spin State
subTitle: A troubled private investigator plagued by strange blackouts investigates the estranged husband of a young scientist, which reveals a connection between her husband and his own repressed trauma.

title: Manmarziyaan
subTitle: A young, free-spirited woman is torn between two very different men and must decide who to marry. One is an immature, part-time DJ, while the other is a mature and responsible banker.

title: Bhoot Returns
subTitle: Tarun and Namrata move into a luxurious bungalow with Taman and Nimmi, their son and daughter respectively. However, strange occurrences start taking place and they must escape in order to survive.

title: Veere Di Wedding
subTitle: Four young women navigate love, family, and careers while supporting one another. The childhood friends are brought together for Kalindi's wedding and are forced to untangle their lives.

title: Pralay the Destroyer
subTitle: Some thugs annihilate an entire family and flee the scene without facing any consequences. Years later, the universe balances the scales of justice through the sole survivor of the tragedy.

title: Mr. & Mrs. Khiladi
subTitle: When stars misalign, love blossoms between an astrology-obsessed idler and a headstrong fish heiress whose father will settle for nothing less than a hardworking son-in-law.

title: Jawaan
subTitle: Azad fights against the systemic oppression of society. Soon, he finds himself in a web of deceit and crime as he teams up with a group of allies to take down a ruthless arms dealer.

title: Chennai vs China
subTitle: Aravind is a descendant of a martial arts expert, Bodhidharma. He must revive the fighting skills to stop Dong Lee, who comes to India to wage a biological war.

title: Vivah
subTitle: Poonam, a traditional young woman, gets engaged to Prem, a wealthy man. Their faith and love are tested when an accident occurs and leaves Poonam with first degree burns.

title: Snake
subTitle: A young farm girl, ensnared by a sinister stranger's lies, must wield the truth to rescue her family from impending danger.

title: Snake
subTitle: A young farm girl, ensnared by a sinister stranger's lies, must wield the truth to rescue her family from impending danger.

title: Operation Romeo
subTitle: A young man and a woman in love head out during the nocturnal hours. However, chaos ensues when they meet two strangers on their way.

title: Bangistan
subTitle: Hafeez and Praveen, two brainwashed suicide bombers, go on a mission to blast a meeting of religious leaders in Poland. However, due to a turn of events, they change their minds about the bombing.

title: Good Newwz
subTitle: Two married couples are unsuccessful in conceiving and seek medical treatment. However, they end up in a complicated situation after their doctor makes a blunder.

title: Game Paisa Ladki
subTitle: Struggling with the loss of her loved ones, Nazuk becomes entangled with a gangster, planning to extort him and his associates for a reward of 10 crore rupees, setting the stage for a dangerous game.

title: Gangubai Kathiawadi
subTitle: A woman is forced to abandon her Bollywood dreams after her boyfriend sells her to a brothel. As time passes, she builds strong connections in the criminal underworld and rises to power.

title: Crew
subTitle: Three ambitious female cabin attendants from Mumbai get caught in a web of lies during their pursuit of dreams, leading to an unexpected heist.

title: Aranmanai 4
subTitle: Suspicious about his sister's death, Saravanan, a lawyer, tries to solve the mystery behind it, only to discover a mysteriously dark force at play.

title: Supreme Khiladi
subTitle: A charitable trust faces threats from a powerful mafia leader who has set his eyes on its land. He plans to kill the legal heir to grab the wealth, but a brave taxi driver becomes an impediment.

title: Kalki 2898 AD
subTitle: In a post-apocalyptic world, a group of people set out to save a woman pregnant with Lord Vishnu's 10th and final avatar, Kalki, from an evil supreme god-king, Yaskin.

title: Dhadak
subTitle: A world of uncertainties awaits Madhu and Parthavi as their love transcends class divides and blossoms despite the fierce disapproval of their families.

title: Dhadak
subTitle: A world of uncertainties awaits Madhu and Parthavi as their love transcends class divides and blossoms despite the fierce disapproval of their families.

title: Thai Massage
subTitle: Upon finding his body does not work like it used to, a man embarks on a self-discovery journey. He meets a travel blogger and starts bonding with her.

title: Gul Makai
subTitle: Malala Yousafzai, an advocate for female education, speaks up for women who were denied the right to education under the Sharia law by the Taliban.

subTitle: Bringing the best in television.
